name: Dwarf Troll Slayer
availabilitySummary: Mercenaries and Witch Hunters may hire a Dwarf Troll Slayer.
effectSummary: Hired Sword. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits. Rolls injuries like a henchman and advances using the Heroes table.
notes: Equipment choice simplified to two axes. Source also allows a double-handed axe. Special rules: immune to psychology, Hard to Kill and Hard Head.

name: Elf Ranger
availabilitySummary: Mercenaries and Witch Hunters may hire an Elf Ranger.
effectSummary: Hired Sword scout. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits. Helps exploration and spots hidden enemies from farther away.
notes: Equipment: Elf Bow, Sword and Elven Cloak. Elf Bow and Elven Cloak are not yet separate equipment records. Special rules: Seeker and Excellent Sight.

name: Freelancer
availabilitySummary: Mercenaries and Witch Hunters may hire a Freelancer.
effectSummary: Mounted knight Hired Sword. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits.
notes: Equipment: Heavy Armour, Shield, Lance and Sword. Lance and Warhorse support are not yet separate records.

name: Halfling Scout
availabilitySummary: Any warband except Skaven, Undead and Possessed may hire a Halfling Scout.
effectSummary: Archer and cook Hired Sword. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits. The Cook rule can increase maximum warband size by +1.
notes: Cooking pot counts as a Helmet. Cook maximum-warband-size bonus is shown as a note and is not automated yet.

name: Ogre Bodyguard
availabilitySummary: Any warband except Skaven may hire an Ogre Bodyguard.
effectSummary: Large Hired Sword bodyguard. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits, but counts for Rout tests while in battle.
notes: Equipment choice simplified to two swords and light armour. Source also allows axes/clubs mix or a double-handed weapon.

name: Pit Fighter
availabilitySummary: Any warband apart from Undead and Skaven may hire a Pit Fighter.
effectSummary: Close-combat Hired Sword. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits.
notes: Equipment: Morning Star, Spiked Gauntlet and Helmet. Spiked Gauntlet counts as an additional hand weapon and buckler but is not yet a separate equipment record.

name: Warlock
availabilitySummary: Any warband except Witch Hunters and Sisters of Sigmar may hire a Warlock.
effectSummary: Spellcasting Hired Sword. Does not count towards warband size or hero limits. Starts with two Lesser Magic spells generated manually.
notes: Equipment: Staff. Staff and Lesser Magic spells are not yet fully seeded as separate records.
